records.ety: [Of uncertain origin; cf. OF. colp blow, stroke, piece, F. coup, fr. L. colophus buffet, cuff, Gr. <?/]

defs: A small slice of meat; a piece of flesh.
quotes: God knows thou art a collop of my flesh.
Sweetbread and collops were with skewers pricked.

defs: A part or piece of anything; a portion.
quotes: Cut two good collops out of the crown land.
